ValidationRule.description: Cannot edit fully executed and terminated lease
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), OR( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Fully Executed"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Terminated") ), NOT($Permission.Netgain_Permisison_Set), NOT($Permission.PC_Team) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please contact RE Admin team to make changes to fully executed or Terminated Leases.
